fa-cheese-swiss.appearanceId: wedge-shaped block of cheese with round holes punched through the interior; triangular dairy slice outline containing circular void cutouts
fa-cheese-swiss.functionalityId: tags a menu item or recipe as Swiss cheese; labels food content with a holey cheese ingredient
fa-cheese-swiss.intentId: find or categorize Swiss cheese recipes or products; represent dairy or cheese-related food content

fa-cheeseburger.appearanceId: stacked burger with a top bun, cheese slice, patty, and bottom bun in side profile; layered sandwich silhouette with a protruding cheese layer
fa-cheeseburger.functionalityId: selects or labels a cheeseburger menu item; tags food content as a burger with cheese
fa-cheeseburger.intentId: order or find a cheeseburger at a restaurant; represent fast food or burger meal content

fa-cherries.appearanceId: two round cherries hanging from a shared curved stem with a small leaf; pair of spherical fruits joined at their stalks
fa-cherries.functionalityId: tags a recipe or product as cherry-flavored or cherry-containing; labels food content with a cherry fruit item
fa-cherries.intentId: find or categorize cherry-based recipes or products; represent fruit or dessert-related food content

fa-chess.appearanceId: side-by-side chess king and rook piece silhouettes representing the game; pair of tall chess piece outlines of differing heights

fa-chess-bishop.appearanceId: tall chess bishop piece with a rounded body, narrow waist, and pointed top finial; tapered column with a notched spherical head
fa-chess-bishop.functionalityId: selects or places the bishop piece in a chess game; identifies the bishop role in a chess interface
fa-chess-bishop.intentId: move or interact with the bishop piece during a chess game; represent the bishop in a chess-related UI

fa-chess-bishop-alt.appearanceId: alternate-design chess bishop with a more angular or stylized pointed top and simplified body profile; variant bishop piece silhouette with a distinct finial shape

fa-chess-bishop-alt.intentId: move or interact with the bishop using an alternate visual theme; represent the bishop piece in a themed chess UI

fa-chess-board.intentId: start or view a board game on a checkered grid; access a chess or checkers playing environment

fa-chess-clock.intentId: manage game time during a timed chess match; monitor each player's clock in a competitive game

fa-chess-clock-alt.intentId: manage turn-based timing with an alternate clock style; monitor game time using a different clock format

fa-chestnut.functionalityId: tags food content as chestnut-related; labels a recipe or product with a chestnut ingredient

fa-chevron-circle-down.appearanceId: downward-pointing V-shape chevron centered inside a full circle outline; open downward angle bracket enclosed in a circular border
fa-chevron-circle-down.functionalityId: expands a collapsed section or scrolls content downward; opens a dropdown or reveals content below
fa-chevron-circle-down.intentId: reveal more content below or expand a section; open a circular-framed dropdown or accordion

fa-chevron-circle-left.appearanceId: leftward-pointing V-shape chevron centered inside a full circle outline; open left angle bracket enclosed in a circular border
fa-chevron-circle-left.functionalityId: navigates to the previous item or page; moves focus or slides content to the left
fa-chevron-circle-left.intentId: go back to the previous view or item; scroll or pan content leftward

fa-chevron-circle-right.appearanceId: rightward-pointing V-shape chevron centered inside a full circle outline; open right angle bracket enclosed in a circular border
fa-chevron-circle-right.functionalityId: navigates to the next item or page; moves focus or slides content to the right
fa-chevron-circle-right.intentId: advance to the next view or item; scroll or pan content rightward

fa-chevron-circle-up.appearanceId: upward-pointing V-shape chevron centered inside a full circle outline; open upward angle bracket enclosed in a circular border
fa-chevron-circle-up.functionalityId: collapses an expanded section or scrolls content upward; closes a dropdown or hides content below
fa-chevron-circle-up.intentId: collapse expanded content or scroll back to the top; close a circular-framed dropdown or accordion

fa-chevron-down.appearanceId: single downward-pointing V-shape chevron standing alone; open angle bracket pointing toward the bottom
fa-chevron-down.functionalityId: opens a dropdown menu or expands a collapsible section; scrolls the view downward
fa-chevron-down.intentId: reveal additional options or content below; expand a menu or unfold a section

fa-chevron-left.appearanceId: single leftward-pointing V-shape chevron standing alone; open angle bracket pointing toward the left
fa-chevron-left.functionalityId: navigates back to the previous page or item; collapses or closes a panel to the left
fa-chevron-left.intentId: go back to the previous screen or item; move selection or view to the left

fa-chevron-right.appearanceId: single rightward-pointing V-shape chevron standing alone; open angle bracket pointing toward the right
fa-chevron-right.functionalityId: navigates forward to the next page or item; expands or opens a panel to the right
fa-chevron-right.intentId: proceed to the next screen or item; move selection or view to the right

fa-chevron-square-down.appearanceId: downward-pointing V-shape chevron centered inside a square outline; open downward angle bracket enclosed in a rectangular border
fa-chevron-square-down.functionalityId: expands a collapsed section or opens a dropdown within a square container; scrolls content downward in a boxed panel
fa-chevron-square-down.intentId: reveal content below within a square-framed area; expand a boxed dropdown or accordion

fa-chevron-square-left.appearanceId: leftward-pointing V-shape chevron centered inside a square outline; open left angle bracket enclosed in a rectangular border
fa-chevron-square-left.functionalityId: navigates back or slides a panel to the left within a square container; moves selection leftward in a boxed interface
fa-chevron-square-left.intentId: go to the previous item within a square-framed UI element; shift content or view leftward

fa-chevron-square-right.appearanceId: rightward-pointing V-shape chevron centered inside a square outline; open right angle bracket enclosed in a rectangular border
fa-chevron-square-right.functionalityId: navigates forward or slides a panel to the right within a square container; moves selection rightward in a boxed interface
fa-chevron-square-right.intentId: advance to the next item within a square-framed UI element; shift content or view rightward

fa-chevron-square-up.appearanceId: upward-pointing V-shape chevron centered inside a square outline; open upward angle bracket enclosed in a rectangular border
fa-chevron-square-up.functionalityId: collapses an expanded section or scrolls content upward within a square container; closes a dropdown in a boxed panel
fa-chevron-square-up.intentId: collapse content or scroll upward within a square-framed area; close a boxed dropdown or accordion

fa-chevron-up.appearanceId: single upward-pointing V-shape chevron standing alone; open angle bracket pointing toward the top
fa-chevron-up.functionalityId: collapses an expanded section or closes a dropdown menu; scrolls the view upward
fa-chevron-up.intentId: hide expanded content or close an open menu; scroll back toward the top of a section

fa-chevrons-down.appearanceId: two stacked downward-pointing V-shapes one above the other; double open angle brackets both pointing toward the bottom
fa-chevrons-down.functionalityId: scrolls or skips content far downward; fast-forwards or jumps to the bottom of a list or section
fa-chevrons-down.intentId: jump quickly to the bottom of content; skip ahead by a large increment downward

fa-chevrons-left.appearanceId: two stacked leftward-pointing V-shapes side by side; double open angle brackets both pointing toward the left
fa-chevrons-left.functionalityId: navigates back multiple steps or jumps to the beginning; fast-rewinds or skips far left in a sequence
fa-chevrons-left.intentId: go back many steps or jump to the start; move quickly to the leftmost position

fa-chevrons-right.appearanceId: two stacked rightward-pointing V-shapes side by side; double open angle brackets both pointing toward the right
fa-chevrons-right.functionalityId: navigates forward multiple steps or jumps to the end; fast-forwards or skips far right in a sequence
fa-chevrons-right.intentId: advance many steps or jump to the end; move quickly to the rightmost position

fa-chevrons-up.appearanceId: two stacked upward-pointing V-shapes one below the other; double open angle brackets both pointing toward the top
fa-chevrons-up.functionalityId: scrolls or skips content far upward; fast-rewinds or jumps to the top of a list or section
fa-chevrons-up.intentId: jump quickly to the top of content; skip back by a large increment upward

fa-chf-sign.appearanceId: the letters CHF forming a currency symbol, typically with a crossbar or stylized treatment; Swiss franc currency abbreviation as a typographic glyph

fa-child-reaching.appearanceId: small child figure with one or both arms extended upward or outward as if reaching; diminutive human silhouette with arms raised overhead

fa-children.appearanceId: two small child figures side by side, one slightly taller than the other; pair of diminutive human silhouettes representing multiple children

fa-chimney.functionalityId: indicates a fireplace, heating system, or smoke-related feature; marks a chimney sweep or home heating service

fa-chopsticks.appearanceId: two long thin parallel sticks held at an angle converging toward a lower point; pair of slender tapered rods crossing near the tips

fa-church.appearanceId: building facade with a central entrance, pitched roof, and a tall steeple or bell tower with a cross on top; chapel or place of worship outline with a prominent vertical spire

fa-circle.appearanceId: solid or outlined perfect circle with no interior detail; plain round disc or ring shape
fa-circle.functionalityId: marks a selection, status indicator, or bullet point; highlights an item or represents an unread notification dot
fa-circle.intentId: indicate a status or selection state; use as a generic marker or placeholder in a UI

fa-circle-0.appearanceId: circle containing the numeral 0 centered within its boundary; round border enclosing a zero digit
fa-circle-0.functionalityId: selects or labels item number zero in a numbered list or sequence; marks the zeroth step or option in an interface
